Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class ProofRule

org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.ReasonerOutput

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule
      Returns the name of this proof rule this should be used for display.

      Note : The returned object must not be modified in any way.

      Specified by:
      getDisplayName in interface IProofRule
      Returns:
      the display name of this proof rule

    • getConfidence

      public int getConfidence()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule
      Returns the confidence of this proof rule as returned by the reasoner.
      Specified by:
      getConfidence in interface IProofRule
      Returns:
      the confidence of this proof rule (see IConfidence)

    • apply

      public IProverSequent[] apply(IProverSequent seq)
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule
      Applies this rule to the given sequent and returns the sequents resulting from this rule application, or null in case this rule was not applicable to the given sequent.

      Note that during normal operation, this method is meant to be used only internally within the sequent prover. It has been made public so that people implementing their own rules have a way of testing them independently of the proof tree data structure.

      Specified by:
      apply in interface IProofRule
      Parameters:
      seq - Sequent on which this rule should be applied
      Returns:
      The sequents resulting from this rule application, or null in case this rule was not applicable to the given sequent.

    • getNeededHyps

      public Set<Predicate> getNeededHyps()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule
      Returns the needed hypotheses of this proof rule as returned by the reasoner.

      The returned collection preserves the order of the elements from the collection used to construct it.

      Note : The returned object must not be modified in any way.

      Specified by:
      getNeededHyps in interface IProofRule
      Returns:
      the needed hypotheses of this proof rule

    • getGoal

      public Predicate getGoal()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule
      Returns the goal of this proof rule as returned by the reasoner.

      The goal may be null in the case when the rule is applicable to a sequent with any goal. In this case it is permitted that the antecedents also have a null goal. The null value then serves as a wildcard that can be instantiated upon rule application for any predicate occurring as the goal of the sequent on which the rule is applied.

      Specified by:
      getGoal in interface IProofRule
      Returns:
      the goal Predicate of this proof rule, or null if the rule is does not depend on the goal.

    • getAntecedents

      public IProofRule.IAntecedent[] getAntecedents()
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule
      Returns the antecedents of this proof rule as returned by the reasoner.

      Note : The returned object must not be modified in any way.

      Specified by:
      getAntecedents in interface IProofRule
      Returns:
      the antecedents of this proof rule (see IProofRule.IAntecedent)

    • processDeps

      public ProofDependenciesBuilder processDeps(ProofDependenciesBuilder[] subProofsDeps)

    • translate

      public IProofRule translate(FormulaFactory trFactory) throws UntranslatableException
      Description copied from interface: IProofRule
      Translates this proof rule to the given formula factory.
      Specified by:
      translate in interface IProofRule
      Parameters:
      trFactory - the destination formula factory
      Returns:
      the translated proof rule
      Throws:
      UntranslatableException - if this proof rule is not translatable with the given factory
